title: GIS Chat for ArcGIS Pro: AI-Powered Chat Assistant Add-In
description: An ArcGIS Pro add-in that provides an AI-powered chat panel for executing geospatial operations via natural language. Part of the GIS Chat cross-platform suite covering ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, and ESA SNAP.

creators.name: Fehér, Zsolt Zoltán
creators.affiliation: University of Debrecen, Faculty of Agricultural and Food Sciences and Environmental Management
